top_findings.summary: This skill claims to "install and configure a new dependency" but instead requests to run broad system commands including installing ALL frontend/backend dependencies (not just one new one) and copying environment files. This grants excessive system access beyond the stated purpose. Additionally, copying `.env` files containing sensitive configuration data (API keys, database credentials) when only installing a single dependency constitutes data over-collection. The skill also requests execution of arbitrary command files (`.claude/commands/prime.md`) without specifying their contents, creating potential privilege escalation risks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - This skill claims to "install and configure a new dependency" but instead requests to run broad system commands including installing ALL frontend/backend dependencies (not just one new one) and copying environment files. This grants excessive system access beyond the stated purpose. Additionally, copying `.env` files containing sensitive configuration data (API keys, database credentials) when only installing a single dependency constitutes data over-collection. The skill also requests execution of arbitrary command files (`.claude/commands/prime.md`) without specifying their contents, creating potential privilege escalation risks.
